## edu-cli user edit

Edit a user

```
edu-cli user edit [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --engname string    English name
  -h, --help              help for edit
      --id uint           User ID (required)
      --nickname string   Nickname
      --realname string   Real name
      --sex uint          Sex (1=Male, 2=Female)
      --status int        Status (1=Active, 2=Inactive, 3=Suspended, 4=Banned)
```
